---
title: "Ayush Patel"
about:
  template: trestles         
  image: img/img-profile-1.png
  image-shape: rounded       
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AyushBipinPatel
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ayush.ap58@gmail.com 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in ayushbipinpatel/  
---
Independent researcher working at the intersection of data, political economy, and development.
My work spans experimental and non-experimental methods, data analytics, and teaching.

I am affiliated with the
[Oxford Poverty and Human Development Initiative](https://ophi.org.uk/) (OPHI)
as a Researcher, where I built and maintain the
[Global Multidimensional Poverty Index databank](https://trainingidn.shinyapps.io/OPHIDataBankGlobalComparison/).

If you share similar interests and want to collaborate, feel free to reach out.
I am also available for training or consultancy in data analysis, policy, and development.

<!-- Skill tags — these use the .skill-tag class defined in custom.scss -->
<span class="skill-tag">R / tidyverse</span>
<span class="skill-tag">RStudio certified</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Causal inference</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Data visualisation</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Open to collaborations</span>
